subject: [PATCH v4 1/8] mm: list_lru: lock_list_lru_of_memcg() cannot return NULL if !skip_empty

reviews.author: Liam R. Howlett
reviews.summary: Applied the Reviewed-by tag without commenting on the patch's technical merits.

2026-05-21.patch_summary: This patch series aims to remove unnecessary NULL checks in the list_lru code, ensuring that locks are always acquired even when adding or deleting items from a list. The changes focus on improving the robustness of the list_lru implementation.
